## Requirement

Fixture FR used by `findFRByFRCode` integration tests. Encodes `AC-1.M` lines
so `FR-1` lookup returns this ULID.

## Acceptance Criteria

- AC-1.1: Placeholder AC for unambiguous lookup.
- AC-1.2: Second AC on the same FR number.
